title: DatasetQuality
description: INTERNAL dataset-level scoring record aggregated from example scores. The quality signals and ranked example-ID lists below are proprietary and are NOT returned to clients; the API returns only non-signal metadata. Signal semantics and formulas are intentionally not documented here.

id.description: Unique identifier for this quality record

experiment_run_id.description: ID of the experiment run this quality assessment belongs to

dataset_quality.description: Internal dataset scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

coverage_score.description: Internal dataset scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

diversity_score.description: Internal dataset scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

efficiency_score.description: Internal dataset scoring signal in [0, 1]. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

top_informative_ids.description: Internal ranked example IDs. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

top_difficult_ids.description: Internal ranked example IDs. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

low_value_ids.description: Internal ranked example IDs. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

redundant_pairs.description: Internal redundant example ID pairs. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

score_distributions.description: Internal score distribution statistics. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

example_ids.description: Example IDs related to this recommendation

recommendations.description: Internal improvement recommendations. Proprietary; not returned to clients.

algorithm_version.description: Version of the quality assessment algorithm

created_at.description: Timestamp when this quality assessment was computed

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this quality assessment was last updated
